```{=html}
<style>
        :root {
            --accent:          #667eea;
            --accent-dark:     #5568d3;
            --gradient-start:  #667eea;
            --gradient-end:    #764ba2;
        }
        #board-wrap {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
            line-height: 1.6;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gradient-start) 0%, var(--gradient-end) 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 20px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        #board-wrap .container {
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .board-header {
            background: white;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .board-header h1 {
            color: #2d3748;
            margin: 0 0 10px 0 !important;
            padding: 0 !important;
            border: none !important;
            font-size: 2.5em;
        }

        .subtitle {
            color: #718096;
            font-size: 1.1em;
        }

        .api-link {
            display: inline-block;
            margin-top: 15px;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            background: var(--accent);
            color: white;
            text-decoration: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-weight: 600;
            transition: background 0.3s;
        }

        .api-link:hover {
            background: var(--accent-dark);
        }

        .loading {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 40px;
            color: white;
            font-size: 1.2em;
        }

        .error {
            background: #fed7d7;
            border: 2px solid #fc8181;
            color: #742a2a;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .messages {
            display: grid;
            gap: 20px;
        }

        .message {
            background: white;
            padding: 25px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
        }

        .message:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }

        .message-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            padding-bottom: 10px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
        }

        .message-title {
            font-size: 1.4em;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #2d3748;
            margin: 0 !important;
            padding: 0 !important;
            border: none !important;
        }

        .message-id {
            background: #edf2f7;
            color: #4a5568;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.9em;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .message-content {
            color: #4a5568;
            font-size: 1.05em;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        .message-footer {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            font-size: 0.9em;
            color: #718096;
        }

        .message-author {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        .message-date {
            font-style: italic;
        }

        .empty-state {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 60px 20px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .empty-state svg {
            width: 80px;
            height: 80px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            opacity: 0.5;
        }

        .empty-state h2 {
            color: #4a5568;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        .empty-state p {
            color: #718096;
        }

        @keyframes spin {
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }

        .spinner {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border: 4px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-top-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
        }
</style>

<div id="board-wrap">
    <div class="container">
        <header class="board-header">
            <h1>📝 MessageBoard</h1>
            <p id="badge" style="margin-top: 8px; color: #718096; font-size: 0.95em;"></p>
        </header>

        <div id="app">
            <div class="loading">
                <div class="spinner"></div>
                <p>Lade Nachrichten...</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    const API_BASE = window.location.origin;
    const isPublic = window.location.pathname.startsWith('/board/public');

    const config = isPublic ? {
        apiPath:       '/api/v1/public/messages',
        gradientStart: '#38a169',
        gradientEnd:   '#2c7a7b',
        accent:        '#38a169',
        accentDark:    '#2f855a',
        badge:         '🌐 Öffentlich — keine Authentifizierung erforderlich',
    } : {
        apiPath:       '/api/v1/messages',
        gradientStart: '#667eea',
        gradientEnd:   '#764ba2',
        accent:        '#667eea',
        accentDark:    '#5568d3',
        badge:         '🔒 Authentifiziert',
    };

    const root = document.documentElement;
    root.style.setProperty('--accent',         config.accent);
    root.style.setProperty('--accent-dark',    config.accentDark);
    root.style.setProperty('--gradient-start', config.gradientStart);
    root.style.setProperty('--gradient-end',   config.gradientEnd);

    document.getElementById('badge').textContent = config.badge;

    async function loadMessages() {
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');

        try {
            const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}${config.apiPath}`);

            if (!response.ok) {
                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${response.statusText}`);
            }

            const data = await response.json();
            const messages = data.items;

            if (messages.length === 0) {
                appDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="empty-state">
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z" />
                        </svg>
                        <h2>Keine Nachrichten vorhanden</h2>
                        <p>Verwenden Sie die API, um Nachrichten zu erstellen.</p>
                    </div>
                `;
                return;
            }

            const messagesHTML = messages.map(msg => {
                const createdDate = new Date(msg.created_at).toLocaleString('de-DE');
                const title = msg.title;

                return `
                    <div class="message">
                        <div class="message-header">
                            <h2 class="message-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</h2>
                            <span class="message-id">#${msg.id}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="message-content">
                            ${escapeHtml(msg.content)}
                        </div>
                        <div class="message-footer">
                            <span class="message-author">👤 ${escapeHtml(msg.author)}</span>
                            <span class="message-date">📅 ${createdDate}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');

            appDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="messages">${messagesHTML}</div>`;

        } catch (error) {
            appDiv.innerHTML = `
                <div class="error">
                    <h2>❌ Fehler beim Laden der Nachrichten</h2>
                    <p>${escapeHtml(error.message)}</p>
                    <p style="margin-top: 10px;">
                        Stellen Sie sicher, dass der MessageBoard-Server läuft:
                        <code style="background: white; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px;">make server</code>
                    </p>
                </div>
            `;
        }
    }

    function escapeHtml(text) {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.textContent = text;
        return div.innerHTML;
    }

    // Nachrichten beim Laden der Seite abrufen
    loadMessages();

    // Auto-Refresh alle 10 Sekunden
    setInterval(loadMessages, 10000);
</script>
```
